mapper.select: SELECT select_id, student_no, select_status, grade, select_time, course_id, course_no, course_name, course_type, credits, theory_hours, practice_hours, hours_display, semester_name, semester_code, class_time, classroom, teachers, total_hours FROM v_student_courses_detail WHERE student_no = #{studentNo} ORDER BY semester_code DESC, course_no ASC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(c.credits), 0) FROM student_courses sc INNER JOIN courses c ON sc.course_id = c.id WHERE sc.student_no = #{studentNo} AND sc.status IN ('已修读', '已结课')
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(c.theory_hours + c.practice_hours), 0) FROM student_courses sc INNER JOIN courses c ON sc.course_id = c.id WHERE sc.student_no = #{studentNo}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_courses WHERE student_no = #{studentNo} AND status IN ('已修读', '已结课')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_courses WHERE student_no = #{studentNo} AND status = '待修读'
